caption.text:
Remember your WHY!

Your WHY should get you out of bed in the morning. It should motivate you. Inspire you.

To look good isn't enough. To prepare for the summer isn't enough.

Your future. Your life. Your health is at stake.

What is your WHY?🤔

#FitByRoyce #coach #WeightLoss #ripped #MindsetMatters

carousel_media.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by F.i.T (Focus on inner Transformation) on April 14, 2026 tagging @iamdannyroyce. May be an image of one or more people, biceps, people bodybuilding and text.
Photo by F.i.T (Focus on inner Transformation) on April 14, 2026. May be an image of one or more people, biceps, people bodybuilding, activewear, sportswear and text.

caption.text:
You’re not burning more fat just because you’re sweating more… 💦🚫

MYTH:
“More sweat = more fat loss.”

TRUTH:
Sweat is just your body cooling itself down — not a sign of how many calories you burned.

You can be drenched and burn very little…

Or barely sweat and still have an effective workout. 

Fat loss comes from consistency, effort, and a calorie deficit over time — not how soaked your shirt is.

Stop chasing sweat.

Start chasing results. 🚀

#MythBustingMonday #FatLoss #TrainSmart #coach #FitByRoyce

caption.text:
Your mistakes are either a coffin or a classroom! ⚰️ 📓 

Listen, oftentimes in this life we have tough choices to make. Choices that lead to good or bad consequences. At the end of the day we're all going to make mistakes. It's inevitable.....

What you do after is crucial. Will you keep making the same ones? Falling into the death cycle? 

Or will you learn from them and teach others down the road?

It's all about being of service to others. Do hide what you've learned in this life. Share it. Help others from making the same mistakes.

Choose life. Choose Jesus. Grow and learn. It all begins with a CHOICE! 💯

#fitbyroyce #wisdomwednesday #jesusisking #mistakes #MindsetMatters

caption.text:
Stop rushing to add weight.

If it doesn’t feel right yet… slow it down.

Control your range of motion.

Increase your time under tension.

That’s where the real growth happens 💪🏽

More muscle.

More strength.

More confidence.

Master the weight you’re at now…
and watch how ready you’ll be for the next level.

It’s not just about lifting heavier—

it’s about control.

#fitbyroyce #coach #muscle #weightloss #fitnessreels

caption.text:
MYTH: “Pop a multivitamin, and you can eat whatever you want!” 🚫🍔

TRUTH: Multivitamins are awesome for filling in tiny nutrient gaps, but they’re not a magic bullet! ✨

What they do well:
✔ Support overall health
✔ Help with nutrient deficiencies
✔ Boost energy and immunity

What to watch out for:
⚠️ Overdosing on certain vitamins (like A, D, E, and K) can cause issues.
⚠️ Quality matters! Choose reputable brands.

But remember: They’re supplements, not replacements! Real, whole foods provide fiber, antioxidants, and other essential nutrients that pills can’t match. 🥦🍓

So, enjoy your veggies, balance your meals, and let multivitamins do their supporting act! 💪🏽

#MythBustingMonday #MultivitaminMyths #HealthyLiving #NutritionFacts #FitByRoyce

caption.text:
A new month is upon us! Are you locked in? Often times we get weary and complacent.

Sometimes drained and lose sight of our goals and dreams. I'm telling you right now to lock in 🔐 

Your goals won't come to you. You have to go get em.. Keep God first and seek guidance. 👀 

I have created a program that will help you get ahead of that constant destructive cycle you've been in.

If you want a FREE coaching call. Click the link in bio or COMMENT 👍🏽 below.

#coach #FitByRoyce #fyp #jesusisking #goals

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by F.i.T (Focus on inner Transformation) in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic with @iamdannyroyce. May be an image of one or more people, biceps and text.

caption.text:
Wisdom Wednesday 🤔

Embrace your journey with faith and keep your truth in God. Your purpose is unique, and it's not about comparing yourself to others. Trust that God has a plan designed just for you. Stay true to yourself and keep moving forward with purpose. 🙏🏾✨

"𝘍𝘰𝘳 𝘐 𝘬𝘯𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘯𝘴 𝘐 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘺𝘰𝘶,” 𝘥𝘦𝘤𝘭𝘢𝘳𝘦𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘓𝘰𝘳𝘥, "𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘯𝘴 𝘵𝘰 𝘱𝘳𝘰𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘳 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘵𝘰 𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘮 𝘺𝘰𝘶, 𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘯𝘴 𝘵𝘰 𝘨𝘪𝘷𝘦 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘢 𝘧𝘶𝘵𝘶𝘳𝘦 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘢 𝘩𝘰𝘱𝘦" - 𝘑𝘦𝘳𝘦𝘮𝘪𝘢𝘩 29:11.

#WisdomWednesday #truth #jesusisking #mindset #coach

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by F.i.T (Focus on inner Transformation) on April 01, 2026. May be an image of one or more people, biceps, people bodybuilding and text.

caption.text:
MYTH:
“Shorter rest = better workout.” 🚫⏱️

TRUTH:
Rushing your rest can actually hurt your progress. If you don’t recover, you can’t lift your best… and that means fewer gains. 

But let’s be real y'all…

How many times have you sat down between sets, opened your phone, and suddenly it’s been 5 minutes of nonstop scrolling? 😅📱

Quick tip:💯
Set a timer between sets (60–120 sec or 2–3 min for heavy lifts) so you stay locked in and don’t waste time. ⏳

Train with intention. Rest with purpose. Get results. 

#MythBustingMonday #GymTips #TrainSmart #StayFocused #FitByRoyce

caption.text:
These beautiful freshly bodies we are walking around in are not our own..

Now wait a second... I know you control your body. But think about how the most drastic changes in our bodies are out of our control?! Puberty, periods, sickness... The list goes on.

There's an outside force that created you. That loves you. Honor your body and glorify God with your actions.

As someone who was addicted to porn and lust of the flesh.... I know what it's like to misuse your temple. What it's like to use your body to glorify yourself.

Let's take care of ourselves on the inside and out! 

If you can relate.. Drop a 🙏🏽 below!

#fitbyroyce #fyp #jesusisking #health #coach

caption.text:
Wisdom Wednesday 🤔 

Ever had one of those nights where your mind just won’t quiet down? 😅 

Last night, I was wide awake, my head racing with worries and what-ifs. But this morning, in my Bible time, I was reminded—it's time to let go and give those burdens to God. 🙏🏽✨ 

Remember, as Matthew 28 reminds us, 'Come to me, all you who are weary, and I will give you rest.' So let’s kick those worries to the curb and trust the process! 🌟 

#WisdomWednesday #iamdannyroyce #fyp #jesusisking #fitbyroyce

caption.text:
Still confused about when to do cardio? Read this… 🤔

You’ve been doing cardio WRONG this whole time… 🚫🏃‍♂️

MYTH:
“You have to do cardio at a specific time for it to work.”

TRUTH:
It’s not about when — it’s about consistency. 💪

Lift first for strength.

Cardio first for endurance.

Fat loss? → Just get it DONE. 🔥

Stop overthinking. Start training. 🚀

#MythBustingMonday #CardioMyth #TrainSmart #NoExcuses #FitByRoyce

caption.text:
Wisdom Wednesday 🤔 

Time is one of our most precious gifts, but so often we let it slip away. 

I used to waste so much of it—lost in addiction, watching porn, trapped in a cycle that kept me small and distant from purpose. 

But by God's grace, Jesus set me free, and now I know how valuable each moment is. 

As Psalm 90:12 reminds us, "Teach us to number our days, that we may gain a heart of wisdom." 

Every day is a fresh chance—what are you investing your time in today?

#fitbyroyce #wisdomwednesday #jesusisking #love #time

caption.text:
Time flies!!! Have you made any stride toward your goals?!! 👀

Time is the one thing we can't get back. STOP WASTING it. 

If you're over living the same self-destructive habits. Now is the time to change. 

Download my app for FREE and try it for 7 days. If you like it, and we're a fit... Join the family. If not, we move on. No hard feelings. 

I have left a life of shame, disappointment and sin... and embraced one full pf grace, mercy and Jesus. Let’s goooo!!!🙏🏽

LINK IN BIO👆🏾👆🏾

caption.text:
Myth Busting Monday 

Still holding toe touches before your workout? 👀

You might be putting your muscles to sleep before asking them to perform. 

Wake the body up with dynamic movement first, then save the deep stretching for after the workout.

Move first. Stretch later. Your body will thank you. 💪🏽

#mythbustingmonday #FitnessTips #coach #FitByRoyce #TrainSmart

caption.text:
No it's not about a caloric deficit.....

Belly fat didn’t show up overnight… it’s not leaving overnight either 😅🔥

Top 5 things that ACTUALLY work ⬇️

1️⃣ Eat real food + hit your protein
2️⃣ Lift heavy (muscle burns fat 👀)
3️⃣ Walk more, stress less
4️⃣ Sleep like it’s your job 😴
5️⃣ Stay consistent—even when motivation dips

🚫 No magic teas
🚫 No 1,000 crunches
✅ Just simple habits done daily

The belly is usually the LAST to go…
but it WILL go if you don’t quit 💪🏽

Save this. Share this. Apply this.
Let’s get to work 😤🔥

#FitByRoyce #FatLossJourney #BellyFatLoss #ConsistencyWins #coach

caption.text:
Physical strength is great....

How is your spiritual strength? We often like to "handle" things in our lives by ourselves. In our own way. 

This often times lead to broken cycles, pain, and destruction.

Lean not unto your own understanding. 

Trust in He who gave you everything. He will provide. He will protect. He will fight. Cling to Him!

#fitbyroyce #jesusisking #fyp #coach #love

caption.text:
This life is full of beauty.... If you choose to see it... 

"For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worth comparing with the glory that is to be revealed to us" -Romans 8:18

#iamdannyroyce #fitbyroyce #coach #jesusisking #householdname

node.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by F.i.T (Focus on inner Transformation) on March 12, 2026 tagging @iamdannyroyce. May be an image of one or more people, biceps, people bodybuilding, beach and text.

caption.text:
Some real talk today…

Recently I fell off a little in my spiritual walk. Not proud of it. I got busy, distracted, and before I knew it I wasn’t praying the way I should, wasn’t in the Word the way I should, and I started feeling that discouragement creep in.

And the enemy loves that moment… because that’s when he starts whispering: “See, you failed again.”
But here’s the truth I had to remind myself of — this walk with God was never about being perfect.

We’re going to mess up.

We’re going to fall short.

We’re going to have moments where we feel like we’re not doing enough.

But our perfection was never the requirement… Jesus already handled that part.

📖 Hebrews 10:14 (KJV)
"For by one offering he hath perfected for ever them that are sanctified."

That means even while we’re growing, even while we’re struggling, even while we’re getting back up again… His sacrifice already made the way.

So if you’ve been feeling discouraged lately because you slipped, missed some days with God, or feel like you’re not where you “should” be spiritually…

Don’t quit.

Don’t let failure convince you to stay down.

Get back up. Pray again. Start again.

Progress with God isn’t about never falling — it’s about always returning.

And today… I’m returning.

If you needed this reminder today, drop a 🙏🏽in the comments.

#Faith #WisdomWednesday #ChristianMotivation #KeepGoing #jesusisking

caption.text:
Don't be fooled by social media gurus who you think never fall off or have a bad day... 

Listen, we're all human and therefore not perfect. We may fall off track on our diet or workouts or habits. But don't quit...

The worst thing you can do is quit right before a breakthrough!! 

"𝑨𝒏𝒅 𝒍𝒆𝒕 𝒖𝒔 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝒈𝒓𝒐𝒘 𝒘𝒆𝒂𝒓𝒚 𝒐𝒇 𝒅𝒐𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒈𝒐𝒐𝒅, 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒊𝒏 𝒅𝒖𝒆 𝒔𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒐𝒏 𝒘𝒆 𝒘𝒊𝒍𝒍 𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒑, 𝒊𝒇 𝒘𝒆 𝒅𝒐 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝒈𝒊𝒗𝒆 𝒖𝒑". -Galatians 6:9

#fitbyroyce #coach #fyp #jesusisking #fitnessreels

caption.text:
MYTH
“You need hours of cardio to lose weight.” 🚫🏃‍♀️

TRUTH — Fat loss comes from a calorie deficit + preserving muscle. You don’t need marathon sessions… you need smart training.

Lift consistently, move daily, add 20–30 mins of cardio a few times a week, and let your nutrition do its job.

Work smarter, not longer. 💪🏽🔥

Example of Effective Training:
• 3–4 strength workouts per week (full body or push/pull/legs)
• 20–30 min of cardio on 2–3 days (walking, cycling, incline treadmill, or HIIT)
• 10k steps per day to boost daily calorie burn
• Prioritize protein + balanced meals
• Recover properly (sleep, hydration, mobility)

Do this consistently and the results follow.💯

#FitnessMyths #FatLossTips #StrengthTrainingForWomen #SmartTraining #fitbyroyce

caption.text:
Remember how far you've come. 

On those days that feel like you're stuck... Those days that make everything seem like a failure. 

Those days count the most. Being determined is a decision.

Being resilient is a decision. 

Keep going. Be proud of where you've come from.  Grateful for what's ahead...

#fitbyroyce #coach #fyp #iamdannyroyce #jesusisking

Get tjat form down first. Then add weight. 💯

caption.text:
63 DEGREES IN FEBRUARY?! 😳☀️

Chicago just broke a record today — hasn’t been this warm since 1921… and you already know we outside. 💪🏽🔥

Fresh air. Natural vitamin D. Elevated mood. Better energy.

This is your reminder that sunlight is FREE therapy.

Don’t waste the blessing — move your body, get your steps in, train outside, reset your mind.

When the weather shifts, so should your excuses. 🚀
Let’s work.

#ChicagoWeather #RecordBreaking #fyp #coach #FitByRoyce

caption.text:
Wisdom Wednesday 🤔

You keep praying for new doors…
But you’re still entertaining old habits. 😞 

You want a new relationship — but you won’t heal.
You want financial freedom — but you won’t change your discipline.

You want peace — but you keep feeding chaos.
You want elevation — but you’re loyal to the version of you that God is trying to grow you out of.

That’s the cycle.

We ask God for transformation while protecting the very patterns that keep us stuck. 

New seasons require new obedience. You can’t walk into new doors carrying old self-destruction.

At some point, you have to stop blaming the door… and check the habits.

The breakthrough isn’t just about what God opens.
It’s about what you’re willing to close.

📖 “And be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind…” — Romans 12:2 (KJV)

Renewed mind. New habits. New life.

This week, ask yourself:
What cycle do I need to break so God can trust me with the next level?

#WisdomWednesday #jesusisking #RenewYourMind #SpiritualGrowth #fitbyroyce

caption.text:
Unlock your full potential with progressive overload! 💪🏽

It’s key for building muscle and shedding fat.

Remember, it’s not just about adding more weight—slowing down your tempo can also make a huge difference! 💯

Share this with a friend who’s on their fitness journey, and if you’re ready to level up, click the link in the bio to apply for my program! 🚀

#fitbyroyce #weightloss #fitnessreels #coach #fyp

caption.text:
MYTH:
“You NEED pre-workout to have a fire workout.” ⚡🚫

TRUTH:
Pre-workout is a BOOST — not the source.

Real energy comes from sleep, food, hydration, and showing up CONSISTENTLY. 💥

Use it to level up, not to survive the workout.
Quality in. Strong output. 💪🏽

👉🏾 Hit the link in my bio for EPN Supplements
💥 Use code DROYCE for 10% OFF

Train with purpose. Move with power. LET’S GO. 🚀

#MythBustingMonday #PreWorkoutMyths #EnergyDoneRight #TrainHard #FitByRoyce

caption.text:
You only get one body! Treat it well.💪🏽💯

"Do you not know that your bodies are temples of the Holy Spirit, who is in you, whom you have received from God? You are not your own; you were bought at a price. Therefore honor God with your bodies." -Corinthians 6:19-20 🙏🏽❤️

#wisdom #FitByRoyce #body #coach #temple

caption.text:
Wisdom Wednesday 🤔 

🌟 Protect your mind like you would your most precious treasure! 

Remember, 'Whether you think you can or you can't, you're right.' 💭✨ 

Guard your thoughts, cultivate positivity, and watch how your world transforms! 

Proverbs 23:7 reminds us that as we think in our heart, so we are. Let’s choose to think big and shine bright! 

#MindsetMatters #fitbyroyce #fyp #wisdomwednesday #jesusisking

caption.text:
Quick story.... I had a really bad injury to my right arm playing football.

The doctor told me it wouldn't be the same again. I had shattered ligaments on both sides of the arm at the joint. 

Since then, I've never really benched over 250. It would irritate after awhile due to some dead cartilage.

God is good. Just benched 315lbs and I still had another in the tank.

Moral of the story. Don't give up. Allow God to be the defining factor of your success. NO ONE ELSE! 💯

Here's to that Superhero physique loading......💪🏽

#iamdannyroyce #FitByRoyce #jesusisking #healing #coach
